prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document outlines procedural elements and decisions relevant to a tribunal or panel mechanism, which is applicable in England. Such processes are established under UK law and can pertain specifically to the operations of public bodies or legal entities within England.
